repo_name: Local isometric animation and background drop
intended_use: Editor asset browser discovery for large animation-frame packs
Runtime library candidates for isometric actors, sideview battlers, monsters, drones, trees, and backgrounds

notes: Captured from the local folder previously named 'assets to ingest' and moved under imports/raw/urpg_stuff/assets_to_ingest_20260429.

The aggregate catalog represents large frame folders as image-sequence assets so the editor does not need one browser row per raw frame.
Raw payload remains local and is not export eligible until curated bundle manifests and attribution records are created.
